title: Gym Rat Simulator
description:
Gamers, you know the drill. A small local gym needs your help!

In Gym Rat Simulator, your goal is to turn this scrappy gym into a 5-star fitness hotspot. 

• Expand the Gym with new equipment 

Order a growing variety of gym machines from the catalogue. Place and rearrange them to create your desired layout.

• Attract new Gym members with quality merchandise

Set the prices, and serve members at the cashier to keep the revenue flowing.

• Hire Staff to maintain the Gym

Bring in workers to clean and repair gym machines for you. Hire personal coaches to boost member satisfaction. Host fitness classes with trainers to generate extra income.

• Train your own character to prepare for fitness contest

Jump into workout mini-games to determine how effective each training session is. Grow different muscle group to prepare for competitions.

• Fitness contest and Gym Promotion

Unlock more features by winning in different fitness contest and grow your gym's reputation!
description_short: Grow a failing gym. Expand the facility, order and move equipment, run the gym shop. Hire staff and coaches. Train your own character. Compete in fitness contest to reach 5 stars.
